case_title: AMILCAR B REYES VS. FRANCO MONTARELLO

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF REYES, AMILCAR B AS TO DEFENDANT MONTARELLO, FRANCO INDIVIDUALLY, DBA LITTLE JOE'S RESTAURANT JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF REYES, AMILCAR B RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MONTARELLO, FRANCO INDIVIDUALLY, DBA LITTLE JOE'S RESTAURANT $4,780.44 PRINCIPAL, $1,481.20 INTEREST, $180.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,441.64, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
